questions.question: Which business benefit should the company expect as a result of creating the webchat bot solution?

choices.B: a reduced workload for the customer service agents

questions.question: For a machine learning progress, how should you split data for training and evaluation?

choices.A: Use features for training and labels for evaluation.
choices.B: Randomly split the data into rows for training and rows for evaluation.
choices.C: Use labels for training and features for evaluation.
choices.D: Randomly split the data into columns for training and columns for evaluation.

questions.question: You need to ensure that the model meets the Microsoft transparency principle for responsible AI. What should you do?

choices.D: Set Max concurrent iterations to O.

questions.prompt: For each of the following statements, select Yes if the statement is true. Otherwise, select No.

statements.text: Forecasting housing prices based on historical data is an example of anomaly detection.
Identifying suspicious sign-ins by looking for deviations from usual patterns is an example of anomaly detection.
Predicting whether a patient will develop diabetes based on the patient's medical history is an example of anomaly detection.

questions.sentence: The handling of unusual or missing values provided to an AI system is a consideration for the Microsoft principle for responsible AI.

targets.text: An automated chat to answer questions about refunds and exchange
Determining whether a photo contains a person
Determining whether a review is positive or negative

questions.question: You are designing an AI system that empowers everyone, including people who have hearing, visual, and other impairments. This is an example of which Microsoft guiding principle for responsible AI?

questions.prompt: Match the Microsoft guiding principles of responsible AI to the appropriate descriptions.

targets.text: Ensure that AI systems operate as they were originally designed, respond to unanticipated conditions, and resist harmful manipulation.
Implementing processes to ensure that decisions made by AI systems can be overridden by humans.
Provide consumers with information and controls over the collection, use, and storage of their data.

questions.prompt: To complete the sentence, select the appropriate option in the answer area.
questions.sentence: When developing an AI system for self-driving cars, the Microsoft principle for responsible AI should be applied to ensure consistent operation of the system during unexpected circumstances.

questions.question: Which task should you include to ensure that the service meets the Microsoft transparency principle for responsible AI?

choices.A: Ensure that all visuals have an associated text that can be read by a screen reader.
choices.B: Enable autoscaling to ensure that a service scales based on demand.
choices.C: Provide documentation to help developers debug code.
choices.D: Ensure that a training dataset is representative of the population.
